title: Origins: Stack of Bees
description: A hive mind entity of Bees, stacked together, resembling a player. (For Fabric, Requires Pehkui)
body:
# Stack of Bees
_"A hive mind entity of Bees, stacked together, resembling a player."_

`Made for Fabric, Minecraft version 1.20.2, Origins version 1.12.4) impact: 3, Icon: Bee Nest, Requires Pehkui`

### "I <3 Bees"(Passives):
- [-+] My maximum health is equal to the amount of Bees in my body.
- [=] (0.5 hearts per Bee, up to 32 Hearts at the maximum 64 Bees)
- [-+] My size is equal to my Bees. 
- [=] (0.05 Block height per Bee.)
- [=] (0.05 at one Bee, up to 6 Blocks tall at the maximum 64 Bees.)
- [+]  I regen one Bee every 30 seconds.
- [-+] I count as an Arthropod, and the Bane of Arthropods enchantment can be used against me and my kind.
- [+] All of my attacks inflict 10 seconds of Poison
- [-] Whenever I damage something, one of my bees die as a consequence of losing their stinger

### "Scatter!"(Primary Active Ability, Default keybind = G):
- [+] I can drop 3 Bees from my body.
- [-] Dropping Bees reduces my maximum health pool.(with this ability = 1.5 hearts)

### "Reassemble!"(Sneak Ability, Default keybind = Shift):
- [+] I can collect nearby Bees.
- [+] They enter our system. + 0.5 Maximum hearts per Bee picked up.
- [+] Doing this gives me regen for 3 seconds.

### "Hive Mind Tactics"(Secondary Active Ability):
- [+] I can command nearby Bees to attack a target.
- [+] Passives:
- [+] When I am attacked, Bees will try to defend me.
- [+] When I attack, Bees will also attack with me.
- [+] Bees don't bother me.

### "Bee Flight"(Creative Flight Passives)
_"Together we can fly about as fast as human sprints"_
- [+] I don't take fall damage, unless I am near campfires or wearing too much armor.
- [-] I can't sprint while flying.
- [-] I can't fly or sprint anywhere near campfires and I become very slow and sleepy.
- [-] I cannot swim at all! Very difficult to enter flight or leave water!
- [-] I can't fly with better armor than full iron.

### "Weaknesses":
- [-] I start with only 10 Bees (5 hearts)
- [-] When I take damage, I drop Bees equal to the amount of damage taken.
- [=] This means that I also lose maximum health equal to the amount of damage taken.
- [-] PvP Opponents can counter this origin by placing water or campfires.
- [-] This origin can't fly and becomes greatly slowed when within 16 blocks of any Campfire.

_Origin by Frucs, inspired by and made for The Pollen Party Jam! A spinoff of the similar Origin Stack of Silverfish that I also made._
